title: Vtopmart Glass Mixing Bowls with Lids, Set of 5 Borosilicate Glass Salad Bowl, Nesting Kitchen Serving Bowls for Prep, Cooking, Baking, Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe (0.2/0.5/1.0/2.0/3.5 L)
features: Premium High Borosilicate Glass Mixing Bowls: Made of high borosilicate glass, heat-resistant, BPA-free, and safe for microwave, oven, fridge, freezer, and dishwasher. Durable and non-porous for daily use.
Versatile Glass Mixing Bowl Set: Includes 0.2/0.5/1.0/2.0/3.5 L glass mixing bowls and salad bowls for mixing, prepping, baking, serving, and storing. A complete glass bowl set for all kitchen needs.

Clear, Non-Staining, Easy-to-Clean Glass Bowls: Transparent glass bowls allow easy viewing of contents. Non-porous material won’t absorb odors or stains, perfect for glass mixing, salad, and serving bowls.

Stable & Easy-to-Handle Nesting Bowls: Glass mixing bowls and salad bowls designed with wide rims, smooth edges, and stable bases for comfortable mixing, tossing, and pouring. Nesting bowls save space in the kitchen.

Lids for Airtight Storage and Serving: Each glass mixing bowl comes with a fitted lid to keep food fresh, prevent spills, and allow safe storage. Ideal for leftovers, meal prep, or using as salad bowls.

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Hand wash lids separately. Microwave, oven, fridge, and freezer safe. Do not microwave with lid. Dishwasher safe for bowls only. Allow to cool before handling.
